goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'entertainment' and should be in the 'south'.
Make sure you get 'postcode' and 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'tandoori palace'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
